report.defect_summary: [workflow_tester][P0] First probe task fails with SessionLockEntry.acquire AttributeError
report.report_text:
Module: workflow_tester > first real probe task
Suggested Priority: P0

Phenomenon:
- A real workflow_tester agent was created on 2026-03-27 and a real chat session was opened: sess-web-20260327-222529-1b13b1.
- The first real /api/tasks/execute call created task task-20260327-9f356109.
- The task failed immediately with status=failed and summary=AttributeError: 'SessionLockEntry' object has no attribute 'acquire'.
- Trace/events show the failure happened before any assistant output was produced.

Expected Result:
- workflow_tester should be able to execute its first low-risk black-box probe task.
- The session should produce an assistant result or at least enter normal running/completion flow.

Actual Result:
- The task failed immediately.
- Backend error: AttributeError: 'SessionLockEntry' object has no attribute 'acquire'.

Impact:
- The newly created workflow_tester cannot perform the first real bug-probe task.
- This blocks using workflow_tester as a stable production bug-probing role.

Evidence:
- D:\code\AI\J-Agents\Analyst\.test\20260327-222226-333\artifacts\99-summary.json
- D:\code\AI\J-Agents\Analyst\.test\20260327-222226-333\artifacts\04-task-final.json
- D:\code\AI\J-Agents\Analyst\.test\20260327-222226-333\artifacts\06-task-trace.json
- D:\code\AI\J-Agents\Analyst\.test\20260327-222226-333\artifacts\02-create-session.json
